**What problem does this solve**
What you're trying to do that the app doesn't support today.

**Proposed approach**
Your idea, if you have one.

**Scope check**
Have a look at `docs/PROJECT.md` §7.2 (non-goals) and §13 (open questions)
first — cloud/network features for core verification are out of scope by
design, not by oversight.
